DECLARATION OF JOHN BOONE IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO DEEM REQUEST FOR ADMISSION ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT BOONE, JOHN WINSTON # 17808111

LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED AT THE HEARING THAT SHE WAS IN THE SAME INN OF COURT AS PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL MARC LEWIS AND PAUL LLEWELLYN. THIS WILL NOT AFFECT JUDGE MILLER'S ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN THIS CASE. NO OBJECTIONS WERE RAISED. MR. LASSART INFORMED THE COURT THAT MR. BOONE HAS BEEN IN CUSTODY SINCE JULY 8, 2013 AT THE METROPOLITAN DETENTION CENTER IN LOS ANGELES COUNTY. THEREFORE, IN ORDER TO GIVE MR. BOONE THE OPPORTUNITY TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE AT THE HEARING, THE COURT CONTINUED DEFENDANT JOHN BOONE'S MOTION TO STAY ACTION TO OCTOBER 4, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. IN ADDITION, THE COURT CONTINUES THE DISCOVERY MOTION CURRENTLY SET FOR SEPTEMBER 25, 2013 TO OCTOBER 18, 2013 AT 9:00 AM. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion Andmotion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted, And For Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Oct-18-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Per the Court's order on October 4, 2013, Plaintiff CASTO TRAVEL, INC.'S Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted, And For Monetary Sanctions is STAYED pending completion of the criminal case. This matter is therefore OFF CALENDAR until further notice by the parties. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca L. Woodson; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Mtn To Stay Action
Off Calendar Oct-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - JOHN BOONE, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOHN BOONE'S Motion To Stay Action is granted. This case is stayed pending completion of the criminal case subject to a subsequent motion to lift the stay if circumstances change. MR. BOONE TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/PJB)

Notice Of Motion Andmotion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted, And For Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Sep-25-2013 Continued To Oct-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CASTO TRAVEL, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted, And For Monetary Sanctions - On the Court's own motion this matter is continued to October 18, 2013 at 9:00 am to be heard on the Discovery Calendar.Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)

Mtn To Stay Action
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Continued To Oct-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Marc R. Lewis, Esq. of Lewis & Llewellyn LLP, Tel. 415.800.0591, for plaintiff and opposing party;
James A. Lassart, Esq. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney, Tel. 415.788.1900, specially appearing for defendant and moving party John Boone.

Judge Miller disclosed at the hearing that she was in the same Inn of Court as plaintiff's counsel Marc Lewis and Paul Llewellyn. This will not affect Judge Miller's ability to be fair and impartial in this case. No objections were raised.

Mr. Lassart informed the court that Mr. Boone has been in custody since July 8, 2013 at the Metropolitan Detention Center in Los Angeles County. Therefore, in order to give Mr. Boone the opportunity to appear by telephone at the hearing, the Court continued DEFENDANT JOHN BOONE's Motion To Stay Action to October 4, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. In addition, the Court continues the Discovery motion currently set for September 25, 2013 to October 18, 2013 at 9:00 am. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
